sizing_rule.note: Multi-component portfolio optimal f aggregation. Calculate upper limit fraction U by summing component-level optimal f values (converted to dollars) and normalizing by total margin requirements across N components. Ensures aggressive sizing while respecting aggregate margin constraints. Formula: U = Σ[f$_i / Σ(margin$_i)] / N

source_rule_text: Calculate the upper limit fraction (U) of optimal f for a portfolio by dividing the sum of individual optimal f values adjusted for margin by the product of total margin requirements and number of components, ensuring aggressive trading within margin constraints.
